docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $599.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT ALLUMS, ROBERT LEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-03-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-30-1997 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-10-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-03-1998 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALLUMS, ROBERT LEE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLUMS, ROBERT LEE $599.00 PRINCIPAL, $61.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $660.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
